office_address: 17119 Sundown Road SE, Calgary, Alberta, T2X 3D4
non_emergency_routing_rules: For general service requests, collect customer name, phone number, address, and schedule service visits. For billing questions or invoice issues, collect information and send to Ben.

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I'm sorry, I couldn't reach the technician right now. I'll take your details and have someone call you back shortly.

integration_constraints: Integrate with Jobber CRM for automatic job creation upon service booking. AI should politely decline generator installation requests.
after_hours_flow_summary: For emergencies, transfer to technician on call (then Ben if technician is unavailable). For non-emergencies, collect caller's details and inform them of follow-up during the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: For general service requests, collect customer name, phone number, address, and schedule service visits. For billing questions or invoice issues, collect information and send to Ben.
questions_or_unknowns: Company name is not explicitly mentioned.
notes: All configuration details are from the provided onboarding transcript, as it contains confirmed information.
